rows.label: tlk45600171_01_msg0001
rows.name:
Ahahahaha... Finally I am here! The
Acedian cathedral...it's everything I
imagined! One gigantic work of art!

rows.label: tlk45600171_01_msg0002
rows.name:
I told my husband in Avaritia I
had an "important trade route"
to open, then came sightseeing!

rows.label: tlk45600171_01_msg0003
rows.name:
Ahh, I wonder how much the carvings
on a single pillar here are worth?

rows.label: tlk45600171_01_msg0004
rows.name:
Oh, but that's the merchant in me!
Silly me...you can't put a price
on artwork this magnificent!
